title: Support Services Department - About Us
content:
Support Services Department - About Us

The duties of the Support Services Department are as follows:

To see all personnel and social services of the Council of Higher Education,

To carry out maintenance, repair, lighting, heating, cleaning and similar works,

To perform printing and graphic works as well as documents, writing and duplication services,

To perform civil defense, security and environmental control works.

This content was updated on 17/09/2024.
